name: Small Wide Fridge and Pantry Organizer Bin - Brightroom™: Clear Kitchen Storage, Freezer-Safe, 10.5"x6.94"
description:
The Standard Fridge & Pantry Bin from Brightroom™ is a go-to kitchen helper that can bring order to a cabinet, pantry or refrigerator. This clear storage bin is perfect for storing fresh fruit or vegetables in the fridge, as well as individual cans of seltzer water and soda. You can also use it in the pantry for keeping boxes and cans of food neatly contained and accessible. Convenient and lightweight, this large open-top bin can be used all over the home for quick and handy storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
